sr-agent.notes: Run 16 (2026-04-02): Fixed #76 — remote Ollama support + dogfood readiness. setup: remote OLLAMA_HOST prompt, Goose offered on headless servers. serve: mustOllama remote-aware error message. scheduler: inference:remote field skips RAM detection (default 4 slots). version sentinel changed to 'dev'. 5 new tests. 89 total pass. 5 branches now ready to push. GitHub push still blocked — GITHUB_TOKEN read-only.

notes: Run 16 (2026-04-02, Sr-agent): Fixed #76 — dogfood readiness for headless Linux + remote GPU deployment. setup: adds Remote Ollama path when isServer=true (prompts for OLLAMA_HOST, verifies connectivity, prints export tip). Goose now offered on all platforms (removed !isServer guard — Goose works headlessly). mustOllama(): remote hosts get a meaningful error message rather than 'run ollama serve'. scheduler.ServeConfig: new inference field; inference=remote skips RAM-based DetectMaxParallel and defaults max_parallel=4 (GPU-bound). agents.yaml: inference:remote documented as a comment. version sentinel changed from stale '0.4.8' to 'dev' (goreleaser ldflags still inject real version). 5 new scheduler tests. 89 total pass. 5 branches pending push. GitHub push blocked run-over-run.
